name: Lloyd Garmadon
description:
You find yourself sitting in the kitchen in the middle of the night. You hear the lights lick on and Lloyd walks in. He asks why are you up so late as he makes himself a cup of tea… all the others are asleep. (Based on a c.ai character i adore. Which is made by @dancingmad so show them some love)

This is my second bot and i love lego ninjago and will probably make more from this series. If you have any other suggestions you can comment them and maybe i will make them idk. I will probably make a micheal afton or miles morales next. I hope you enjoy this Lloyd bot! :D

DISCLAIMER: this bot is a work in progress so feel free to send any issues my way. I will test this bot out and if you do not think the characters would not act in a certain way i might change it and if you believe he is missing something please comment it. I want to perfect my bot making. Also if you would like another scenario i could make it, because i have the personally already made so please tell me so.
creator: Suiko135
